<?php namespace Illuminate\Http\Client\Events; use Illuminate\Http\Client\Request; use Illuminate\Http\Client\Response; class ResponseReceived { /** * The request instance. * * @var \Illuminate\Http\Client\Request */ public $request; /** * The response instance. * * @var \Illuminate\Http\Client\Response */ public $response; /** * Create a new event instance. * * @param \Illuminate\Http\Client\Request $request * @param \Illuminate\Http\Client\Response $response */ public function __construct(Request $request, Response $response) { $this->request = $request; $this->response = $response; } }
